XRP April 2026 Rally Confirmed on Kyobo Life Tokenized Bond Partnership & ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's XRP surged 7.15% this week to $1.43, marking its best April since September 2025, driven by the live launch of Korea’s first tokenized government bond settlement via Ripple Custody with Kyobo Life (announced April 15).[1][2]
